title: The Sealed Chamber
description: Multiple clue types constrain the world. Identify the sign of the target colour aspect.

hints.text: Determine the G sign of ing7. There are 4 alchemicals still consistent with the clues for slot 7. Check whether they all agree on the G sign.
Remaining alchemicals for ing7: pnP(G-), pNn(G-), Nnp(G-), NNN(G-). All share G-.
